hero.title: Aevitas Foto
hero.subtitle: Capturing your precious moments for eternity
hero.backgroundAlt: Background image of four huskies running through a forest

intro.heading: Pet Photography Falkenberg
intro.p1: Capturing the unique personalities of your beloved pets is at the heart of what I do. I love photographing outdoors, where your pets' joyful energy comes alive against the magic of natural light.
intro.p2: For a more polished look, I can bring a small portable studio to your home. Perfect for timeless and elegant portraits in a relaxed environment.
intro.p3: Each session is tailored to you and your pet, ensuring a comfortable, fun experience and stunning high-resolution images that can be treasured for years to come.
intro.imageAlt: Autumn portrait of Caeli and her dog Aske in a forest covered in orange leaves

banner.text: A successful photograph doesn't just show an image, but lets you relive the moment. A memory preserved for a lifetime.
banner.imageAlt: Photograph of 3 girls and their dogs sitting by a lake
